title: Bryan's Mexican Food
description: I like to eat mexican food from the 24/7 Mexican restaurants. Their California burritos are pretty good. I would also like to eat them in Minecraft.
body:
This mod is required on both the client and server.

## Currently adds the following foods and ingredients:
### Foods
- California Burrito (crafted w/ 1 Tortilla + 1 French Fries + 1 Steak)
- Sauced California Burrito (crafted w/ 1 Green Dye + 1 California Burrito)
- Tortilla (crafted w/ 3 Flour)
- Cut Potatoes (crafted w/ 1 Potato)
- French Fries (smelt or cook Cut Potatoes)
### Ingredient
- Flour (crafted w/ 1 Wheat)
